ideation: This animation sequence simulates the action of pumping fuel. The robot will mimic the action of holding a fuel nozzle and squeezing the handle. Frame 1 shows both arms relaxed at the sides. Frame 2 shows the right arm raised slightly, as if holding the fuel nozzle, while the left arm is still at rest. Frame 3 shows the left arm coming forward as if squeezing the handle, while the right arm remains in position. Frame 4 shows the left arm returning to its resting position, and Frame 5 shows both arms returning to their initial relaxed positions. This sequence uses the robot's arm mechanics to convey the act of pumping fuel, making use of the two joints at each shoulder to create a natural-looking motion.

frames.beat: arms hang at the sides, ready to pump
right arm lifts, grabbing the fuel nozzle
left hand squeezes the trigger, fueling up
left arm releases, nozzle is put back
both arms return to a relaxed state
